ogTitle: Cudmirrah vs Culburra Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cudmirrah and Culburra Beach.
heading: Cudmirrah vs Culburra Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cudmirrah, New South Wales and Culburra Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Culburra Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Cudmirrah (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cudmirrah or Culburra Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cudmirrah has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Culburra Beach scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cudmirrah scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Culburra Beach scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cudmirrah or Culburra Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Culburra Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
